title: Switzerland (Canton St.Gallen) Learner's/Driving Licence Application (Gesuch um Erteilung eines Lernfahr- bzw. eines Führerausweises)
description: The application by which a resident of the canton of St.Gallen requests issuance of a Swiss learner's permit (Lernfahrausweis) or driving licence (Führerausweis) for one or more vehicle categories, or requests exchange (Umtausch) of a foreign driving licence for a Swiss one, filed with the St.Gallen Strassenverkehrs- und Schifffahrtsamt (StVA, the cantonal road-traffic and shipping authority). Switzerland has no single federal application-processing body for driving licences: the Bundesamt für Strassen (ASTRA) sets the substantive legal framework (the Verkehrszulassungsverordnung, VZV) but each of the 26 cantons administers its own licensing register and publishes its own version of the application form; this document models the St.Gallen canton's own current, unauthenticated, fillable PDF (a genuine 63-field AcroForm), which several neighbouring cantons' own independently-implemented PDF versions of the same substantive VZV-mandated content (Solothurn's 121-field and Appenzell Ausserrhoden's 73-field AcroForms) corroborate as a broadly standardized nationwide questionnaire rather than a St.Gallen-only idiosyncrasy — see VERIFICATION.md. This document models the applicant-facing content only: the top-of-form application-type and licence-category selection, personal particulars, and the applicant's own self-declared medical/behavioural history and guardianship status (Sections 1-3 and the self-declared item under Section 5). It excludes every part of the same PDF that a party other than the applicant completes: Section 4 (Sehtest), an eyesight examination completed and signed directly on the form by a recognized optician or ophthalmologist; the confirmation-of-identity stamp/signature the Einwohneramt (resident registration office) or StVA itself affixes under Section 5; the legal representative's own signature block for minors/wards; and a small 'Bitte nicht ausfüllen' (please do not complete) internal office-code box. It does not submit an application, book a theory or practical exam, or issue a licence. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Switzerland, the Bundesamt für Strassen (ASTRA), the Canton of St.Gallen, or its Strassenverkehrs- und Schifffahrtsamt.

authority.name: Kanton St.Gallen — Sicherheits- und Justizdepartement, Strassenverkehrs- und Schifffahrtsamt (StVA)

source.documentRef: Gesuch um Erteilung eines Lernfahr- bzw. eines Führerausweises (Kanton St.Gallen, Strassenverkehrs- und Schifffahrtsamt), form ref. 'gesuch-LFA-201224'

verification.notes: GOV-1840: 'GovSchema Standard Research' cycle opening Switzerland as the registry's 27th jurisdiction. CATALOG.md's own Known Gaps entry already confirmed Switzerland's Visa vertical as a dead end (SEM's national D-visa and Schengen C-visa PDFs are field-for-field duplicates of already-modelled EU-harmonized templates) and its domestic Passport process as cantonal/appointment-based with no downloadable form; this cycle screened the remaining unscreened verticals (DMV, Business Formation, Taxes, National ID) and picked DMV via ASTRA's nationally-referenced 'Formular 46'-style learner's/driving-licence application, sourced concretely from the canton of St.Gallen's own current, unauthenticated, genuine 63-field AcroForm PDF (confirmed live, HTTP 200, no login/CAPTCHA/WAF gate). See VERIFICATION.md for the full candidate screening record (Business Formation, Taxes, Passport, National ID all screened and found weaker or dead this cycle), the field-by-field extraction method, and disclosed judgment calls.

fields.name: applicationType
fields.label: Gesuch um Erteilung eines Lernfahr- bzw. eines Führerausweises / Gesuch um Umtausch eines ausländischen Führerausweises
fields.description: Whether this filing requests issuance of a new Swiss learner's permit or driving licence (issuance), or requests exchange of an already-held foreign driving licence for a Swiss one (exchange). Source PDF field 'Gruppe1', a 2-option radio button (export values '/Auswahl1' and '/Auswahl2').

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryA
fields.label: Kategorie A
fields.description: Whether this application requests category A (motorcycles, unrestricted). One of 21 independent category checkboxes printed in a single row beneath the application-type selection; the form does not restrict an applicant to selecting only one, so this and its sibling category fields are modelled as independent booleans with no fabricated exclusivity constraint.

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryALimited35kw
fields.label: Kategorie A bis 35 kW
fields.description: Whether this application requests category A restricted to motorcycles of at most 35 kW.

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryA1
fields.label: Kategorie A1
fields.description: Whether this application requests category A1 (light motorcycles).

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryB
fields.label: Kategorie B
fields.description: Whether this application requests category B (cars).

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryB1
fields.label: Kategorie B1
fields.description: Whether this application requests category B1 (quadricycles/tricycles).

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryC
fields.label: Kategorie C
fields.description: Whether this application requests category C (heavy goods vehicles).

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryC1
fields.label: Kategorie C1
fields.description: Whether this application requests category C1 (medium goods vehicles).

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryD
fields.label: Kategorie D
fields.description: Whether this application requests category D (buses).

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryD1
fields.label: Kategorie D1
fields.description: Whether this application requests category D1 (minibuses).

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryBE
fields.label: Kategorie BE
fields.description: Whether this application requests category BE (car with heavy trailer).

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryCE
fields.label: Kategorie CE
fields.description: Whether this application requests category CE (heavy goods vehicle with heavy trailer).

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryC1E
fields.label: Kategorie C1E
fields.description: Whether this application requests category C1E (medium goods vehicle with heavy trailer).

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryDE
fields.label: Kategorie DE
fields.description: Whether this application requests category DE (bus with heavy trailer).

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryD1E
fields.label: Kategorie D1E
fields.description: Whether this application requests category D1E (minibus with heavy trailer).

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryF
fields.label: Kategorie F
fields.description: Whether this application requests category F (light motor vehicles restricted to 45 km/h, e.g. some agricultural/utility vehicles).

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryG
fields.label: Kategorie G
fields.description: Whether this application requests category G (agricultural/forestry vehicles restricted to 30 km/h).

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryM
fields.label: Kategorie M
fields.description: Whether this application requests category M (mopeds).

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryBPT121
fields.label: Kategorie BPT121
fields.description: Whether this application requests the BPT121 professional-passenger-transport authorization (berufsmässiger Personentransport, VZV Art. 121 category) alongside a base category.

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryBPT122
fields.label: Kategorie BPT122
fields.description: Whether this application requests the BPT122 professional-passenger-transport authorization (VZV Art. 122 category).

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryCZV95
fields.label: Kategorie CZV95
fields.description: Whether this application requests the CZV95 professional driver competence qualification (Chauffeurzulassungsverordnung Art. 95), required for professional goods/passenger transport driving.

fields.name: wantsLicenceCategoryC1Article118
fields.label: Kategorie C1 118
fields.description: Whether this application requests the category C1 special-provision authorization referenced on the form as 'C1 118' (VZV Art. 118).

fields.name: fullName
fields.label: Name (Geburtsname aufführen, sofern nicht mit Familienname identisch)
fields.description: The applicant's family name; the birth name is written here instead when it differs from the current family name.

fields.name: firstName
fields.label: Vorname(n)
fields.description: The applicant's given name(s).

fields.name: streetAndNumber
fields.label: Strasse, Nr.
fields.description: Street name and house number of the applicant's residential address.

fields.name: postalCode
fields.label: PLZ
fields.description: 4-digit Swiss postal code of the applicant's residence.

fields.name: placeOfResidence
fields.label: Wohnsitz
fields.description: Town/municipality of the applicant's residence, printed on the same line as PLZ.

fields.name: placeOfOriginOrHomeState
fields.label: Heimatort (ausländische Staatsangehörige: Heimatstaat)
fields.description: For a Swiss citizen, the applicant's Heimatort (citizenship municipality of origin); for a foreign national, their state of nationality (Heimatstaat), per the field's own parenthetical instruction.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Geburtsdatum (Tag/Monat/Jahr)
fields.description: The applicant's date of birth, printed day/month/year.

fields.name: gender
fields.label: weiblich / männlich
fields.description: The applicant's gender, a 2-widget checkbox pair sharing one field name ('Geschlecht') immediately beside the date-of-birth box, printed 'weiblich' (female) then 'männlich' (male). The underlying PDF's own on-widget export values ('/ja' for the 'weiblich' widget, '/nein' for 'männlich') are an internal authoring artifact of the source template (apparently copied from a yes/no checkbox elsewhere on the form) and are not meaningful outside this document; this schema uses its own semantic enum values rather than reproducing them.

fields.name: phoneNumber
fields.label: Telefonnummer
fields.description: The applicant's telephone number.

fields.name: email
fields.label: E-Mail
fields.description: The applicant's email address.

fields.name: ahvNumber
fields.label: AHV-Nummer (ersichtlich auf der Krankenversicherungskarte)
fields.description: The applicant's 13-digit Swiss social-insurance (AHV/AVS) number, in the standard 756.XXXX.XXXX.XX format (visible on the applicant's health-insurance card). The source PDF splits this single logical value across 4 adjoining comb-style text boxes ('AHV_1' through 'AHV_4', widths proportional to 3/4/4/2 digits) with no printed separator between them; modelled here as one logical field, consistent with this registry's established practice for split comb-box identity numbers (e.g. cz/md/zadost-o-zapis-silnicniho-vozidla's rodné číslo).

fields.name: hasMetabolicDisease
fields.label: Haben Sie eine der folgenden Krankheiten oder sind Sie deswegen in ärztlicher Behandlung? — Zuckerkrankheit oder andere Stoffwechselerkrankung
fields.description: Self-declaration: whether the applicant has diabetes or another metabolic disease, or is under medical treatment for one.

fields.name: hasCardiovascularDisease
fields.label: Herz-Kreislauf-Erkrankung
fields.description: Self-declaration: whether the applicant has a cardiovascular disease.

fields.name: hasEyeDisease
fields.label: Augenerkrankung
fields.description: Self-declaration: whether the applicant has an eye disease.

fields.name: hasRespiratoryDisease
fields.label: Erkrankung der Atmungsorgane (u.a. Asthma, keine Erkältungen)
fields.description: Self-declaration: whether the applicant has a respiratory-organ disease (e.g. asthma; ordinary colds do not count, per the form's own parenthetical).

fields.name: hasAbdominalOrganDisease
fields.label: Erkrankung der Bauchorgane (u.a. Diabetes)
fields.description: Self-declaration: whether the applicant has a disease of the abdominal organs.

fields.name: hasNervousSystemDisease
fields.label: Erkrankung des Nervensystems (MS, Parkinson usw.)
fields.description: Self-declaration: whether the applicant has a nervous-system disease (e.g. multiple sclerosis, Parkinson's).

fields.name: hasKidneyDisease
fields.label: Nierenerkrankung
fields.description: Self-declaration: whether the applicant has a kidney disease.

fields.name: hasExcessiveDaytimeSleepiness
fields.label: erhöhte Tagesschläfrigkeit
fields.description: Self-declaration: whether the applicant experiences increased daytime sleepiness.

fields.name: hasChronicPain
fields.label: chronische Schmerzzustände
fields.description: Self-declaration: whether the applicant has chronic pain conditions.

fields.name: hasUnhealedAccidentInjury
fields.label: nicht folgenlos ausgeheilte Unfallverletzung
fields.description: Self-declaration: whether the applicant has an accident injury that has not healed without lasting effects.

fields.name: hasBrainPerformanceDisorder
fields.label: Krankheit mit Hirnleistungsstörungen
fields.description: Self-declaration: whether the applicant has an illness involving impaired brain function/cognitive performance.

fields.name: hasAlcoholOrDrugProblem
fields.label: Haben Sie heute oder hatten Sie jemals Probleme mit Alkohol, Betäubungsmitteln?
fields.description: Self-declaration: whether the applicant currently has, or has ever had, problems with alcohol or drugs.

fields.name: alcoholOrDrugTreatment
fields.label: Wenn ja, waren oder sind Sie deswegen in Behandlung?
fields.description: Follow-up to hasAlcoholOrDrugProblem: whether the applicant was, or is, in treatment for it. Only meaningful (and, per the form's own 'wenn ja' — if yes — wording, only asked) when hasAlcoholOrDrugProblem is true.

fields.name: hasPsychiatricIllness
fields.label: eine psychische Erkrankung?
fields.description: Self-declaration: whether the applicant has a psychiatric illness.

fields.name: psychiatricTreatment
fields.label: Wenn ja, waren oder sind Sie deswegen in Behandlung?
fields.description: Follow-up to hasPsychiatricIllness: whether the applicant was, or is, in treatment for it. Only meaningful when hasPsychiatricIllness is true.

fields.name: hasEpilepsy
fields.label: Epilepsie oder epilepsieähnliche Anfälle?
fields.description: Self-declaration: whether the applicant has epilepsy or epilepsy-like seizures.

fields.name: hasFaintingOrSleepinessEpisodes
fields.label: Ohnmachtsanfälle/Schwächezustände/Einschlafneigung?
fields.description: Self-declaration: whether the applicant has fainting spells, states of weakness, or a tendency to fall asleep suddenly.
fields.sourceRef: Section 2, 'Krankheiten' (source PDF's internal field name; the printed question is about fainting/weakness/sleep episodes, not a generic 'other diseases' catch-all — see VERIFICATION.md)

fields.name: hasOtherConditionAffectingSafeDriving
fields.label: Haben Sie andere Krankheiten oder Behinderungen, die Sie am sicheren Führen eines Fahrzeugs hindern könnten?
fields.description: Self-declaration: whether the applicant has any other disease or disability that could prevent them from safely operating a vehicle, not already covered by the preceding specific questions.

fields.name: hasComprehensiveGuardianship
fields.label: Stehen Sie unter einer umfassenden Beistandschaft?
fields.description: Self-declaration: whether the applicant is under comprehensive guardianship (umfassende Beistandschaft, Art. 398 ZGB).

fields.name: representativeNameAndAddress
fields.label: Name, Adresse der Vertreterin oder des Vertreters
fields.description: Name and address of the applicant's legal representative (deputy/guardian), completed when the applicant is under comprehensive guardianship.

fields.name: licenceEverRefusedOrRevoked
fields.label: Wurde Ihnen schon einmal der Lernfahr- oder Führerausweis verweigert oder entzogen oder das Führen von Fahrzeugen verboten?
fields.description: Self-declaration: whether the applicant has ever previously been refused a learner's/driving licence, had one revoked, or been prohibited from driving a vehicle. Positioned under the Section 5 heading ('Bestätigung der Identifikation... durch das Einwohneramt') but is itself an applicant self-declaration, not an authority-completed item — distinct from the confirmation stamp/signature that follows it, which this schema excludes as office-completed (see VERIFICATION.md). If yes, the form instructs the applicant to attach a copy of the relevant decision (see documents[]).

fields.name: dateOfRequest
fields.label: Datum
fields.description: Date the request is signed. The form prints this beside a plain 'Unterschrift' (signature) line near the bottom of page 1; the signature itself has no corresponding fillable widget (an ink signature), consistent with this registry's established practice for widget-less signature lines accompanying a fillable date box.

documents.label: 1 farbiges Passfoto (Format 35 x 45 mm), wenn das Foto nicht digital eingereicht wird (1 colour passport photo, if the photo is not submitted digitally via the form's own QR-code digital-photo-upload service)

Nothelferausweis (first-aid/emergency-response course certificate), required for a first-time application for category A, A1, B, or B1 unless the applicant already holds a licence in one of those categories or is applying for an exchange of a foreign licence
ausländischer Führerausweis im Original (original foreign driving licence), required when applicationType is exchange
Kopie Ausländerausweis (Schweizer Aufenthaltsbewilligung) (copy of Swiss residence permit), required when applicationType is exchange

Kopie gültiger Lehrvertrag (copy of a valid apprenticeship contract), required only for road-transport/automotive-technician or motorcycle-mechanic apprentices applying under the relevant early-access provision

Sehtest (eyesight test), completed and signed directly on this form (p.1, Section 4) by a recognized Swiss optician or ophthalmologist, valid 24 months; required unless the applicant already holds a valid Swiss learner's or driving licence
documents.sourceRef: Section 4 (Sehtest), out of scope as applicant-entered fields — see VERIFICATION.md

steps.title: 2. Krankheiten, Behinderungen und Substanzkonsum (diseases, disabilities, and substance use)
